properties.name: server.compression.enabled
properties.description: Enables response compression for the server.

properties.name: server.compression.min-response-size
properties.description: Minimum response size in bytes that will be compressed. Responses smaller than this size will not be compressed.

properties.name: spring.application.version
properties.description: A description for 'spring.application.version'.

properties.name: spring.application.log
properties.description: A description for 'spring.application.log'.

properties.name: spring.main.lazy-initialization
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable lazy initialization of Spring beans. When set to true, beans will be initialized on demand rather than at startup, which can improve startup time but may lead to longer response times for the first request.

properties.name: spring.r2dbc.url
properties.description: R2DBC connection URL used by the application to connect to the PostgreSQL database reactively.

properties.name: spring.r2dbc.username
properties.description: Database username used by the R2DBC reactive connection.

properties.name: spring.r2dbc.password
properties.description: Database password used by the R2DBC reactive connection.

properties.name: spring.r2dbc.pool.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable the R2DBC connection pool.

properties.name: spring.r2dbc.pool.initial-size
properties.description: Initial number of connections created in the R2DBC connection pool.

properties.name: spring.r2dbc.pool.max-size
properties.description: Maximum number of connections allowed in the R2DBC connection pool.

properties.name: spring.r2dbc.pool.max-idle-time
properties.description: Maximum amount of time a connection can remain idle in the R2DBC pool before being closed.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.host
properties.description: Redis server host used by the application for caching and temporary data storage.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.port
properties.description: Redis server port used by the application.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.username
properties.description: Username used to authenticate with the Redis server.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.password
properties.description: Password used to authenticate with the Redis server.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.database
properties.description: Redis logical database index used by the application.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.timeout
properties.description: Maximum duration to wait for Redis operations before timing out.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.ssl.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable SSL/TLS for Redis connections.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.repositories.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable Spring Data Redis repositories.

properties.name: spring.version
properties.description: A description for 'spring.version'.

properties.name: configMap.message
properties.description: A description for 'configMap.message'.

properties.name: tumipay.security.internal.api-key
properties.description: Internal API key used for authenticating trusted internal requests between TumiPay services.

properties.name: tumipay.microservice.name
properties.description: The name of the TumiPay microservice.

properties.name: tumipay.microservice.version
properties.description: The version of the TumiPay microservice.

properties.name: tumipay.microservice.environment
properties.description: The environment where the microservice is running.

properties.name: tumipay.microservice.startup-log-enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable startup logs for the microservice.

properties.name: tumipay.microservice.startup-log-level
properties.description: The log level for startup logs.

properties.name: tumipay.microservice.spring-version
properties.description: The Spring framework version.

properties.name: tumipay.microservice.logs-path
properties.description: The path where logs are stored.

properties.name: tumipay.microservice.port
properties.description: The port on which the microservice runs.

properties.name: tumipay.microservice.context-path
properties.description: The servlet context path of the microservice.

properties.name: tumipay.microservice.description
properties.description: TumiPay Microservice Template.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.code
properties.description: Payment provider code identifier.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.name
properties.description: Payment provider display name.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.timeout
properties.description: Payment provider common timeout in milliseconds.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.payout-source-account-id
properties.description: Source account identifier used by the payment provider to originate payout transactions.

properties.name: tumipay.common-configuration.amount-scale
properties.description: Defines the number of decimal places (scale) to be used when processing and storing monetary amounts across the platform, ensuring consistency in rounding and precision for financial calculations.

properties.name: tumipay.common-configuration.payin-service-enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable the PayIn service in TumiPay, allowing for dynamic control over the availability of payment processing features without requiring code changes or redeployments.

properties.name: tumipay.common-configuration.payout-service-enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable the PayOut service in TumiPay, allowing for dynamic control over the availability of payment processing features without requiring code changes or redeployments.

properties.name: tumipay.common-configuration.amount-rounding-mode
properties.description: Specifies the rounding mode used for monetary calculations, following standard rounding strategies (e.g., HALF_UP, HALF_EVEN) to ensure deterministic and consistent financial results.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.security.base-url
properties.description: Payment provider security base url integration.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.security.endpoints.generate-token-path
properties.description: Payment provider security generate token endpoint url integration.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.security.endpoints.refresh-token-path
properties.description: Payment provider security generate token endpoint url integration.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.integration.base-url
properties.description: Payment provider transaction base url integration.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.integration.endpoints.payin-transaction-path
properties.description: Payment provider Transaction PayIn endpoint url integration.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.integration.endpoints.payout-transaction-path
properties.description: Payment provider Transaction PayOut endpoint url integration.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.integration.endpoints.get-transaction-path
properties.description: Payment provider Transaction Get Transaction endpoint url integration.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.authorization.expiration-time-ms
properties.description: Payment provider Authorization Expiration Time in Milliseconds.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.authorization.refresh-threshold-ms
properties.description: Payment provider Authorization Threshold Time in Milliseconds.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-provider.authorization.scheduler-fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds for the provider authorization scheduler.

properties.name: tumipay.schedulers.scheduler-authorization-refresh.enabled
properties.description: TumiPay Flag to enable or disable the provider authorization refresh scheduler.

properties.name: tumipay.schedulers.scheduler-authorization-refresh.scheduler-fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: TumiPay Fixed delay in milliseconds for the provider authorization refresh scheduler.

properties.name: tumipay.schedulers.scheduler-authorization-refresh.scheduler-initial-delay-ms
properties.description: TumiPay Initial delay in milliseconds for the provider authorization refresh scheduler.

properties.name: tumipay.schedulers.scheduler-webhook-dispatcher-scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable the webhook worker scheduler.

properties.name: tumipay.schedulers.scheduler-webhook-dispatcher.scheduler-initial-delay-ms
properties.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before the webhook worker scheduler starts.

properties.name: tumipay.schedulers.scheduler-webhook-dispatcher.scheduler-fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between executions of the webhook worker scheduler.

properties.name: tumipay.schedulers.scheduler-webhook-receiver.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable the webhook receiver scheduler.

properties.name: tumipay.schedulers.scheduler-webhook-receiver.scheduler-initial-delay-ms
properties.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before the webhook receiver scheduler starts.

properties.name: tumipay.schedulers.scheduler-webhook-receiver.scheduler-fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between executions of the webhook receiver scheduler.

properties.name: spring.flyway.enabled
properties.description: Enables or disables Flyway database migrations.

properties.name: spring.flyway.url
properties.description: JDBC URL used by Flyway for database migrations.

properties.name: spring.flyway.user
properties.description: Database username used by Flyway.

properties.name: spring.flyway.password
properties.description: Database password used by Flyway.

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to baseline an existing schema on migrate.

properties.name: spring.flyway.create-schemas
properties.description: Whether Flyway should create schemas if they do not exist.

properties.name: spring.flyway.schemas
properties.description: Comma-separated list of schemas managed by Flyway.

properties.name: spring.flyway.default-schema
properties.description: Default schema used by Flyway.

properties.name: spring.flyway.locations
properties.description: Locations of migration scripts.

properties.name: spring.datasource.url
properties.description: JDBC URL used by Flyway for database migrations.

properties.name: spring.datasource.username
properties.description: Database username used by Flyway.

properties.name: spring.datasource.password
properties.description: Database password used by Flyway.

properties.name: spring.datasource.driver-class-name
properties.description: Fully qualified name of the JDBC driver. Auto-detected based on the URL by default.

properties.name: spring.datasource.hikari.maximum-pool-size
properties.description: Maximum number of connections in the Hikari connection pool.

properties.name: spring.datasource.hikari.minimum-idle
properties.description: Minimum number of idle connections in the Hikari connection pool.

properties.name: spring.datasource.hikari.idle-timeout
properties.description: Maximum amount of time that a connection is allowed to sit idle in the Hikari connection pool.

properties.name: spring.datasource.hikari.max-lifetime
properties.description: Maximum lifetime of a connection in the Hikari connection pool.

properties.name: spring.datasource.hikari.connection-timeout
properties.description: Maximum number of milliseconds that a client will wait for a connection from the Hikari connection pool.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-gateway.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the TumiPay payment gateway used to dispatch webhook events and interact with gateway APIs.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-gateway.api-key
properties.description: API key used to authenticate requests sent to the TumiPay payment gateway.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-gateway.timeout
properties.description: Timeout in milliseconds for requests sent to the TumiPay payment gateway.

properties.name: tumipay.payment-gateway.endpoints.webhook-event-path
properties.description: Relative path of the payment gateway endpoint used to dispatch webhook payment events.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-dispatcher.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable the webhook worker processing component.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-dispatcher.worker-id
properties.description: Unique identifier for the webhook worker instance. Used to differentiate workers in distributed deployments.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-dispatcher.batch-size
properties.description: Number of webhook events processed per batch execution by the webhook worker.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-dispatcher.max-retry-count
properties.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for a failed webhook event before it is marked as permanently failed.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-dispatcher.concurrency
properties.description: Number of concurrent threads or coroutines used by the webhook worker to process events in parallel.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-dispatcher.retry-backoff-seconds
properties.description: Backoff time in seconds before retrying a failed webhook event.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-dispatcher.worker-timeout-minutes
properties.description: Timeout in minutes for a single webhook worker execution cycle. Events being processed longer than this threshold may be re-queued.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-dispatcher.validating-timeout-minutes
properties.description: Timeout in minutes for webhook events stuck in a validating state. Events exceeding this threshold will be reassigned or marked as failed.

properties.name: tumipay.authorization-refresh.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable the authorization refresh component responsible for processing the authorization events.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-receiver.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable the webhook receiver component responsible for ingesting incoming webhook events.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-receiver.batch-size
properties.description: Number of incoming webhook events fetched and processed per batch by the webhook receiver.

properties.name: logging.level.com.tumipay.microservice
properties.description: Log level for TumiPay microservice.

properties.name: logging.level.org.springframework.r2dbc
properties.description: Log level for Spring R2DBC.

properties.name: logging.level.org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure
properties.description: Log level for Spring Boot auto-configuration.

properties.name: logging.level.org.flywaydb
properties.description: Log level for Flyway database migration framework.

properties.name: webclient.pool.max-connections
properties.description: Maximum number of connections in the WebClient connection pool.

properties.name: webclient.pool.pending-acquire-timeout
properties.description: Timeout duration for acquiring a pending connection from the WebClient pool.

properties.name: webclient.pool.max-idle-time
properties.description: Maximum idle time for connections in the WebClient pool before they are closed.

properties.name: webclient.pool.max-life-time
properties.description: Maximum lifetime for connections in the WebClient pool.

properties.name: webclient.pool.evict-in-background
properties.description: Background eviction interval for idle connections in the WebClient pool.

properties.name: webclient.timeout.connect
properties.description: Connection timeout for WebClient requests.

properties.name: webclient.timeout.response
properties.description: Response timeout for WebClient requests.

properties.name: webclient.tcp.keep-alive
properties.description: Enable TCP keep-alive for WebClient connections.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-signature.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable webhook signature validation for incoming webhook requests.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-signature.tolerance-seconds
properties.description: Maximum allowed time difference in seconds between the webhook event timestamp and the current server time to prevent replay attacks.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-signature.signature-header
properties.description: HTTP header name containing the webhook signature generated by the payment provider.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-signature.timestamp-header
properties.description: HTTP header name containing the webhook event timestamp used during signature validation.

properties.name: tumipay.webhook-signature.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to validate webhook signatures generated by the payment provider.
